runTitle: Vercel Production Playwright MCP Recheck - v8.12.90 After GitLab Token Recovery
coveredSurfaces: GitLab API token recovery was verified separately before this rerun; Vercel production QA could proceed without GitLab API 401 noise
Vercel production deployment dpl_J1PEim6zfHjgGUoB9NcYqgEH2hVj remained Ready for alias https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app
Production /api/version returned v8.12.90, release tag v8.12.90, commit 36b29a5ca3d7e2505312cee873c6c7653c00e9c6, and GitLab pipeline 2577188591
Playwright MCP pre-auth landing rendered the logged-out landing state with v8.12.90 visible
Playwright MCP pre-auth landing console warning/error count was 0
Playwright MCP pre-auth landing observed 0 /api/system requests
Playwright MCP observed the public /api/health?service=ai&soft=true preload path instead of the auth-protected /api/system path
Playwright MCP route checks passed for /login, /main redirect to /, /privacy, and a custom 404 route
Playwright MCP guest login modal opened from /login with no console warning/error
Soft AI health initially returned a recoverable Cloud Run cold-start timeout and then recovered to ok/healthy with ai-engine version 8.12.89
Vercel usage check remained normal with effective 1.9358 USD and billed 0.0000 USD
skippedSurfaces: This was a verification-only rerun on the same v8.12.90 deployment, so it is not counted toward aggregate QA totals
Dashboard guest login was not completed because the Playwright MCP execution sandbox cannot read .env.local/process env and the guest PIN was not passed into the MCP session
AI chat and live conversational QA were not rerun because the task did not change AI routing, prompt behavior, or Cloud Run AI Engine code
Full broad route matrix was not rerun because QA-20260605-0651 already covered the targeted production fix and this run was requested as a post-token-recovery recheck

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed after the v8.12.90 post-token-recovery Playwright MCP rerun; effective 1.9358 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 1827.

artifacts.label: v8.12.90 Vercel Playwright MCP recheck after GitLab token recovery

expertAssessments.rationale: The Vercel deployment remained Ready, version metadata matched v8.12.90, GitLab token recovery removed API verification noise, and Vercel usage stayed billed at 0.0000 USD.
The requested Playwright MCP rerun covered the pre-auth console/network regression, core route smoke, login modal availability, and health recovery without duplicating aggregate release QA totals.
The soft health endpoint exposed a recoverable Cloud Run cold-start timeout and then returned ok/healthy on retry, matching the expected free-tier cold-start behavior.

notes: The intentional 404 route emitted a browser document 404 console error; it is not counted as a production console regression for the landing/login/privacy route checks.
The first /api/health?service=ai&soft=true call returned a recoverable cloud_run_health_timeout and the retry returned ok/healthy with ai-engine 8.12.89.
The Playwright MCP execution sandbox did not expose Node fs/process access, so the guest PIN was not read from .env.local for dashboard login. The guest PIN modal itself opened cleanly.
